Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 262 

PRE_ICL_DAYS_INNPP_1M 

LABEL: Pre-ICL In-Network Non-Preferred Pharmacy - days in 1-month supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the number of days in a one-month supply of a drug on this tier, when using an 
in-network non-preferred pharmacy (INNP; also known as a standard retail pharmacy within a split 
network P) during the pre-initial coverage limit (ICL) phase of
